validation_or_usage_notes: Pattern FUP-###; immutable once referenced in audit logs.

business_definition: Short operational label for the question.
validation_or_usage_notes: Not shown to customers by default.

business_definition: Type of unmet information condition that activates the question.

validation_or_usage_notes: Must align with an INFO_REQUIRED condition; no manual-review trigger should appear here.

business_definition: Item #3 rule that grounds the question.
validation_or_usage_notes: Must be an active policy-rule identifier.

business_definition: Decision stage in which the question may be asked.

business_definition: Item #7 evidence profile connected to the question.

validation_or_usage_notes: Used to prevent duplicate requests and track completion.

business_definition: Ordering priority; lower numbers are asked first.

validation_or_usage_notes: Must not imply an approval or accuse the customer.

business_definition: Required agent behavior after receiving the response.
validation_or_usage_notes: Must direct reassessment, not final decision invention.
example_value: Validate the date and re-run policy checks.
